title: Have coffee or lunch with someone you've been meaning to catch up with
flavour: 'we should hang soon' → today is soon. execute the plan.

title: Call someone instead of texting them — and stay on for at least 15 minutes
flavour: voice calls are a lost art. ancient technology. rediscover it.

title: Introduce yourself to a neighbor you've never spoken to
flavour: you share a building/street/planet. might as well have a name for them.

title: Attend a local event by yourself — stay for at least an hour
flavour: solo mode unlocked. no co-op required. observe. exist. maybe talk.

title: Have a real disagreement with someone — calmly, without backing down or blowing up
flavour: not every conflict needs to be avoided. practice holding your ground.

title: Write and send a letter or card — on actual paper
flavour: analog transmission. someone will hold this. they'll feel it differently.

title: Reconnect with someone you had a falling out with — just reach out
flavour: you don't have to fix everything. just open the door a crack.

title: Ask someone in your life for honest feedback about yourself
flavour: not 'am i cool?' ask something real. brace for honesty. grow.

title: Organize a group hangout with 3+ people
flavour: you are the main character. main characters make plans. make a plan.

title: Spend an hour with a family member doing something they want to do
flavour: on their terms. their activity. your full attention. no phone.
